title: Remove 2 stale 'herdctl' (pre-rename product name) references
action: 1) .gitignore: remove the 2-line block `# herdctl runtime state + local config (durable state is in the user's XDG dirs).` and `/herdctl.toml` (around line 30-31) - this ignore pattern is a leftover from before the product was renamed to herdr-go and no file named herdctl.toml is ever written by current code. 2) web/vite.config.ts: the comment near the top (around line 4) reads '// During dev, /api and /ws are proxied to the running herdctl backend.' - change 'herdctl backend' to 'herdr-go backend'. Both are comment/config-text-only changes with zero functional impact.

truths: .gitignore no longer has the /herdctl.toml entry or its comment
vite.config.ts's comment says herdr-go, not herdctl
no functional change to vite.config.ts's actual proxy config
prohibitions: Do not change vite.config.ts's actual proxy target/rules, only the comment wording

verify: cargo test --quiet && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
